calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-13-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOSHUA J. YOUSSEFI, Esq. of Bickel Sannipoli APC (Tel: 619-374-4100) for plaintiff;
Atty. JORDAN A. WILLETTE, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully (Tel: 415-986-5900) for defendant Hyundai Motor America.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Hyundai Motor America's (Hyundai) motion to transfer venue is denied. Plaintiff sued Hyundai for violations of the Song-Beverly Consumer Warranty Act regarding his 2022 Hyundai vehicle. The parties appear to agree that warranty work on plaintiff's vehicle could be performed at any authorized Hyundai dealer, including one in San Francisco, and that venue is proper against a corporation wherever "the contract is to be performed." (CCP 395.5; Memo. 2:6-7, 4;16-17; Opp. 1:6-8, 1:27-2:14.) Thus, plaintiff's venue selection was proper.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
